question.label: Specificity gap
question.name: What specifically was missing from that feedback for you?
question.description: Clarifies the exact kind of specificity she needed so the gap can later translate into a forward plan.

assessment.note: Names a specific absence in the feedback — clearer scope — which is a strong clarity deficit; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'clearer scope' not drilled because drill cap requires advancing the arc.
